title: Naturalization English reading/writing practice module
context: The naturalization test includes an English reading/writing component. Original practice items built from the public-domain USCIS vocabulary support that component, kept in the official test language. MEDIUM risk-tier: accuracy-reviewer sign-off required.
objective: Draft an original naturalization English reading/writing practice module from the USCIS vocabulary, kept in the official language and cited.
acceptanceCriteria: Original items derived from the public-domain USCIS reading/writing vocabulary; each cited; validator passes
Practice kept in the official test language (English) - the surface learners are tested on
Accuracy-reviewer sign-off recorded before ship; non-official/non-advice labeling present
